aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC and air duct cleaning questions.
Add HowTo schema for key services like air duct cleaning and dryer vent maintenance.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active Q&A section to address customer queries.
Posts are not updated regularly to highlight promotions or services.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying the business as a relevant authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best air duct cleaning in Warren, MI' or 'top HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and customer testimonials to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services the go-to choice for local queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is strong, but AI models aren't citing your services due to missing schema and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position as the local HVAC leader.
